scripts.build: npm run build-grammar && npm run build-compiler
scripts.build-compiler: npx tsx ../stage3/3F/index.ts Stage4-ast.s3f > /tmp/_s4_ast.ts && mv /tmp/_s4_ast.ts Stage4-ast.ts && npx tsx ../stage3/3F/index.ts Stage4-lower.s3f > /tmp/_s4_lower.ts && mv /tmp/_s4_lower.ts Stage4-lower.ts && npx tsx ../stage3/3F/index.ts Stage4-codegen.s3f > /tmp/_s4_codegen.ts && mv /tmp/_s4_codegen.ts Stage4-codegen.ts && npx tsx ../stage3/3F/index.ts Stage4-macro-env.s3f > /tmp/_s4_macro_env.ts && mv /tmp/_s4_macro_env.ts Stage4-macro-env.ts && npx tsx ../stage3/3F/index.ts Stage4-macro-expand.s3f > /tmp/_s4_macro_expand.ts && mv /tmp/_s4_macro_expand.ts Stage4-macro-expand.ts && npx tsx ../stage3/3F/index.ts Stage4-scope-resolve.s3f > /tmp/_s4_scope_resolve.ts && mv /tmp/_s4_scope_resolve.ts Stage4-scope-resolve.ts && npx tsx ../stage3/3F/index.ts Stage4.s3f > /tmp/_s4_main.ts && mv /tmp/_s4_main.ts ./index.ts
scripts.test: npm run build && npx vitest run
